title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at OLX India Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at OLX India Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at OLX India Asia Pacific Associates. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Ghaziabad-based team.

About OLX India Asia Pacific Associates:
OLX India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with OLX India Asia Pacific Associates!
